message:
feat(tui,db,cli): disable FK enforcement, add markdown render cache, improve TUI layout and empty states

Database (schema.rs):
- Explicitly disable foreign_keys via PRAGMA in all connection and
  initialization SQL blocks. The statically linked SQLite enables FK
  enforcement by default (SQLITE_DEFAULT_FOREIGN_KEYS), which causes
  cascading failures when orphan data exists (e.g. agents referencing
  deleted projects). FK REFERENCES are kept for documentation only.

CLI (legacy.rs):
- Change execute_import() call to pass `true` instead of `false`,
  enabling setup refresh after legacy import completion.

Analytics screen:
- Fix conditional logic for persisted vs runtime insight feed selection
  (swap the empty-check branches to correct precedence).
- Update AnomalyKind variants: ErrorRateSpike -> HighErrorRate,
  MessageVolumeDrop -> ThroughputDrop to match updated enum names.
- Add #[allow(clippy::cast_precision_loss)] to suppress lint in
  build_runtime_insight_feed.
- Split the combined empty-cards/empty-active-cards render path into
  two distinct branches with dedicated render_empty_state and
  render_filtered_empty_state helpers for clearer user feedback.
- Formatting fixes (rustfmt compliance).

Dashboard screen:
- Add UltraWide terminal class handling for summary_band_height (3)
  and anomaly_rail_height (4) to utilize extra screen real estate.
- Lower dense dashboard surface breakpoints from 140x22 to 128x20
  and reduce SUPERGRID/MEGAGRID minimum widths for earlier activation.
- Update corresponding unit tests to match new thresholds.

Search screen:
- Add HashMap-based rendered_markdown_cache to SearchCockpitScreen for
  lazy-cached markdown rendering of message bodies, avoiding redundant
  re-renders on every frame repaint.
- Thread the cached render through estimate_search_detail_lines and
  render_detail as an optional override, maintaining fallback to the
  entry's own rendered_body field.
- Clear cache on new search execution and db reconnection.
- Add fill_rect calls for panel background clearing in results and
  detail panes to prevent visual artifacts.
- Use array pattern instead of closure in trim_start_matches for
  markdown-to-plain conversion (idiomatic Rust).
- Update all render_detail test call sites with the new parameter.

Threads screen:
- Introduce THREAD_DETAIL_PANE_GAP_THRESHOLD and
  THREAD_DETAIL_MIN_PREVIEW_WIDTH constants for more precise layout.
- Add 1px gap between tree and preview panes on wider terminals for
  visual separation, with clear_rect to paint the gap.
- Switch preview rendering from manual line slicing to Paragraph with
  WrapMode::Word and scroll(), enabling proper word-wrapped scrolling.
- Add inner padding to preview content area when height permits.
- Add clear_rect in thread flow visualization for clean repaints.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
